name: @barlevalon/documentation-system-skill
description_en: Apply Divio's four-quadrant documentation system to write, audit, classify, restructure, and review technical documentation. Use when creating or improving tutorials, how-to guides, reference docs, explanations, docs...
description_zh: 应用 Divio 的四象限文档系统来编写、审核、分类、重构和审查技术文档。用于创建或改进教程、操作指南、参考文档、解释性文档等
